fasti 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

fasti: Datasets for 'chronos'

Source: R/fasti-package.R
fasti-package.Rd

Datasets for chronological modelling with 'chronos'. This package provides models and data to reproduce results from 'chronos' examples and vignettes.

Details

Package:fasti
Type:Package
Version:0.0.0.9000
License:GPL-3

See also

Useful links:

On this page

fasti is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Anne Philippe, Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.6.9000.
